title: Mercury | Battery-Powered Carbon Monoxide Detector with Clear Visual Display – Portable CO2 Alarm & CO Monitor for Home, Motorhome, and Caravan Safety | Batteries Supplied, 10 Year Working Lifespan
features: Reliable Carbon Monoxide Detection | Equipped with an advanced electromechanical sensor, this device provides accurate, real-time monitoring of CO levels, alerting you to potential dangers quickly and efficiently
Battery-Powered for Versatile Use | This portable, battery-operated design ensures continuous protection even during power outages, making it ideal for homes, motorhomes, and caravans
Loud 85dB Alarm for Immediate Alerts | With a powerful 85dB alarm, this detector provides an unmistakable warning sound that’s easily heard, ensuring prompt awareness and swift action
User-Friendly LCD Display | The clear LCD screen displays current CO levels, offering reassurance and convenient monitoring of CO levels at a glance
Compact and Long-Lasting Design | Lightweight and easy to install, this CO detector lasts up to 10 years, ensuring dependable protection without frequent replacements
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Carbon Monoxide Alarm | Battery Operated CO2 Detector with Clear Digital Display The Mercury Battery-Powered Carbon Monoxide Detector is a vital safety device for homes, motorhomes, and caravans. Featuring an advanced electromechanical sensor, it continuously monitors CO levels and alerts you with a loud 85dB alarm if dangerous levels are detected. The LCD display provides real-time CO readings, letting you keep an eye on air safety at a glance. Powered by three AA batteries, this detector operates independently of mains power, making it versatile for both home and travel use. With a 10-year lifespan, it ensures long-term peace of mind, adding essential protection against the silent dangers of carbon monoxide. PRODUCT FEATURES: Real-Time CO Monitoring with clear LCD display for instant visibility Loud 85dB Alarm ensures immediate awareness of danger Battery-Powered for flexibility and use in power outages. Batteries are supplied Compact and Portable, ideal for homes, motorhomes, and caravans 10-Year Lifespan for long-lasting protection and peace of mind BOX CONTAINS: Carbon monoxide alarm 3 x AA Alkaline batteries User guide SPECIFICATION: Apparatus Type B Batteries 3 x AA (supplied) Alarm level 85dB @ 3m Sensor Electromechanical Static working current 80uA Operating temperature -10°C to 45°C CO alarm level 27ppm - 55ppm: within 60 to 90 mins, 110ppm: within 10 to 40 mins, 330ppm: within 3 mins Lifespan 10 years from date of manufacture Dimensions 110 x 77 x 37mm Weight 203g
